SessionManagePage.shareText: 🏸 {{title}} is on! Tap the link to join (sign-up and gate code are inside)
SessionManagePage.copiedInvite: Invite text and link copied — paste it into your group!
SessionManagePage.posterSubtitle: Scan to join and pick a spot to play
SessionManagePage.seatingBoard: 🏸 On-site seating board (seat players for them)
SessionManagePage.confirmApproveOverQuota: The session is full — approve "{{name}}" anyway?
SessionManagePage.confirmReject: Decline "{{name}}"'s sign-up? They won't be notified and can sign up again later.
SessionManagePage.noOneYet: No one yet — add someone below
SessionManagePage.approveFamilyBtn: ✅ Approve this family member (needed before they can play/queue)
SessionManagePage.paidToggleOff: Fee not collected (tap to mark paid)
SessionManagePage.confirmDisconnect: Disconnect "{{name}}"? They'll be removed from this session and can't act (they can rejoin).
SessionManagePage.confirmRemoveCourtPlaying: Delete this court? Players on court will be counted in stats (as if finished), and queued players will be un-queued.
SessionManagePage.fairSortHint: ⚖️ Sorted by fairness: fewest games first
